title: selaginella arenicola var. acanthonota
intro: Selaginella arenicola var. acanthonota is a type of evergreen, perennial fern-like plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to have various health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and have antibacterial properties. In traditional herbal medicine, it is often prepared as a tea or used in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
